evidence.snippet: We believe the future of human-machine teaming starts with making the mechanism of interaction more natural. The real unlock for autonomous systems isn't just platform motion, compute, and connectivity. It's the software-defined control layer that lets one operator effectively collaborate with multiple systems without added training burden.
Anura is a next-generation human-machine interface. We pair a natural language interface with an embodied agent to bring intuitive, conversational collaboration capabilities to any uncrewed system.

items.notes: Anura is a software-defined natural language / voice-control command & control layer for drones, UGVs, and other uncrewed systems

evidence.snippet:
### Battlefield Management Systems
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/643980cb97f4f82c2acaa29d/6d0ca0f5-296c-4920-8c19-046bf69562e4/anura_for_intel.jpg)
Anura also supports intelligence analysis and mission planning, orchestrating and accelerating all the low-level tasks required to go from raw data to powerful insights based on a user’s intent.
With Anura, users can conversationally query databases and rapidly display information on a common operating picture.

items.notes: Anura also supports battlefield management, intelligence analysis, and mission planning use cases

We believe the future of human-machine teaming starts with making the mechanism of interaction more natural. The real unlock for autonomous systems isn't just platform motion, compute, and connectivity. It's the software-defined control layer that lets one operator effectively collaborate with multiple systems without added training burden.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Anura is a pure-software natural language / voice-control interface licensed to drone operators and military units; no hardware manufactured

items.name: Anura
items.product_type: natural language human-machine interface software for uncrewed systems

evidence.snippet:
Meet Anura, the Next-Generation Warfighting Interface
-----------------------------------------------------
Anura fundamentally changes the paradigm of command & control within human-machine integrated formations, moving from complex button-mashing to natural language tasking. Beyond the obvious span of control benefits, this shift dramatically reduces training time and costs. That means increased adoption of new hardware and faster deployment of new capabilities on existing platforms.

items.notes: Voice/NLP control layer for drones, UGVs, and other UxS; edge-deployable, platform-agnostic; integrations with Teal 2, Teal Golden Eagle, and Skydio X2D shown

blue_uas.notes: News item (Feb 14 2025) states 'Primordial Labs selected to advance in DIU's Blue UAS Framework Process', linking to the DIU Blue UAS refresh list and framework selection page; indicates framework selection rather than confirmed final cleared-list status

evidence.snippet:
In addition to the general support on this page, if we’ve deployed licenses to your unit, check for the QR code on your End User Device (EUD). That’ll take you directly to a detailed feedback form and we’ll be in touch ASAP.
[Create your own user feedback survey](www.surveymonkey.com)

readiness.notes: Licenses deployed to military units (USSOCOM, Army Special Forces); SBIR Phase II contract awarded; active field use confirmed by operator quotes

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed on site
Whether Anura has achieved final cleared status on DIU Blue UAS Cleared List vs. framework process advancement
tagline: Develops Anura, a natural-language voice-control software platform for flight and ground vehicle command & control. Blue UAS certified and in production; claims to reduce operator training burden and enable single-operator control of heterogeneous unmanned swarms. Public evidence includes operator testimonials from Army and USSOCOM but limited third-party performance data or formal program integration details. NDAA compliance status unknown.
